name: Cave Goblin
description: Small, cruel, nervous creatures that attack from darkness and flee when the fight turns against them.
special_rule: Cave Goblins gain +2 when hiding in darkness or ruins.

name: Skeleton
description: A rattling corpse held together by old magic.
special_rule: Arrows and small piercing weapons deal -1 damage to Skeletons.

name: Wolf
description: A fast predator that attacks in packs.
special_rule: A Wolf gains +2 to attack when another Wolf is attacking the same target.

name: Orc Raider
description: A brutal warrior that trusts strength, fear, and heavy weapons.
special_rule: Once per fight, an Orc Raider may deal +1d6 damage after hitting.

name: Dark Acolyte
special_rule: The Dark Acolyte may cast Flame or Command.

name: Ogre
description: A huge, violent brute with terrible strength.
special_rule: If the Ogre rolls a natural 20 on an attack, the target is knocked down.
